headline: Trump Confirms Khamenei Killed in Joint U.S.-Israeli Operation
summary: President Trump publicly confirmed a successful U.S.-Israeli operation that resulted in the death of Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, stating 'I got him before he got me' in reference to alleged Iranian assassination plots. The operation represents the most significant targeted killing in modern geopolitical history, triggering Iran's ongoing retaliatory campaign across the Gulf. Khamenei's death has created a leadership vacuum in Tehran with an interim ruling council now managing the state.

secondary_markets.name: Brent Crude Oil
secondary_markets.reason: Killing of Iran's Supreme Leader is the single largest geopolitical risk event for Gulf oil supply in decades, driving maximum fear premium into crude.

secondary_markets.name: Lockheed Martin
secondary_markets.reason: Confirmed U.S.-Israeli precision strike operation validates advanced targeting and stealth capabilities, boosting Lockheed's F-35 and precision munitions order outlook.

secondary_markets.name: Raytheon Technologies
secondary_markets.reason: Multi-theater Iranian retaliation across Qatar and Kuwait drives emergency procurement of Raytheon's Patriot and NASAMS air defense batteries across all GCC states.

secondary_markets.name: Gold (XAU/USD)
secondary_markets.reason: Assassination of a sitting head of state and theocratic leader of a nuclear-threshold power is a maximum safe-haven trigger event for gold markets.

secondary_markets.name: Strait of Hormuz shipping (VLCC tankers)
secondary_markets.reason: Iranian retaliation risk to Hormuz passage drives tanker day-rates to crisis levels as shippers price in route closure or military interdiction.

trade_position: Long Frontline Ltd (FRO) and Nordic American Tankers (NAT) as the highest-beta pure-play instruments on a Strait of Hormuz crisis — if Iran's retaliatory campaign extends to Hormuz interdiction, VLCC spot rates will spike 300-500% within days as 20% of global oil supply faces disruption. The hidden catalyst is that tanker companies benefit from BOTH the crisis (rate spike) AND the eventual resolution (massive restocking voyages), making long tanker equities the asymmetric trade with the widest payoff window.

messages.text_en:
#Iran #USA

Ali Larijani, the Secretary of Iran's Supreme National Security Council, criticized former President Trump for causing instability in the region due to what he described as "delusional ambitions." He accused Trump of attempting to weaken Iran and sow discord among its people.

messages.text_en:
#Iran #USA

Ali Larijani is indeed pushing to resume nuclear talks with the U.S. through Omani mediators while managing Iran's security and military response following the death of Supreme Leader Khamenei. Although he is a key figure in Iran's security hierarchy, he is not officially part of the interim ruling council.

#Iran #USA

President Trump claimed that he preemptively struck Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Khamenei, stating, "I got him before he got me," referring to alleged Iranian plots against him. This statement was made following a successful U.S.-Israeli operation that resulted in Khamenei's death.
